validation.email: Enter a valid and available email address.
validation.strongPassword: Use at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase and a number.
validation.terms: You must accept these terms to create the account.

citizen.title: One account to keep track of every procedure.
points: Your applications and results remain available in a private space.
Every important change is dated and explained.
Your email address is verified before any submission.

agent.title: A workspace isolated by authorisation.
points: Access depends on your role and active assignment.
Sensitive operations leave an audit record.

login.title: Find your procedures
login.description: Sign in with the email address used to create your account.
login.agentDescription: This access is reserved for accounts created and assigned by an administration.
login.remember: Keep me signed in on this device
login.noAccount: Do not have an account yet?
login.agentHelp: Your agent account is provided by your administration. Never share your password or temporary code.
login.invalidCredentials: These details cannot open this workspace.
login.passwordResetSuccess: Your password was changed. You can now sign in.

register.title: Create your secure account
register.description: Only a few details are needed. You will then verify your email before starting a procedure.
register.passwordHint: At least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase and a number.
register.terms: I confirm that the information provided concerns me and I accept the platform terms of use.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.description: Enter your email address. If a matching account exists, a temporary link will be sent.
forgot.sent: If this address matches an account, a reset link has just been sent.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.description: The link you received is temporary and can only be used once.

verify.title: Verify your email address
verify.description: This step protects your account and confirms that you can receive information about your procedures.
verify.instructions: Open the AppGov message sent to this address and select the verification link.
verify.sent: A new verification link has just been sent.

confirm.title: Confirm your password
confirm.description: To protect your account, this action requires confirmation.
confirm.invalid: This password does not match your account.

twoFactor.title: Confirm sign in
twoFactor.description: Enter the temporary code displayed by your authentication app.
twoFactor.recoveryDescription: Enter one of the recovery codes saved during activation.
twoFactor.codeHint: The code usually changes every 30 seconds.
twoFactor.invalid: This code is invalid or has expired.
twoFactor.invalidRecovery: This recovery code is invalid or has already been used.

explanations.unverified: Verify your email address to secure the account.
explanations.email_verified: Your email is confirmed. Complete your profile to declare your identity.
explanations.identity_declared: Your identity is declared. It has not yet been checked against documents.
explanations.identity_checked: Your identity has been checked by an authorised authority.

identity.noOfficialCheck: This level only describes checks that were actually performed. It does not replace any official document.

dashboard.title: My procedures
dashboard.emptyDescription: When a procedure opens, your drafts and submitted applications will appear here with their next action.
dashboard.securityDescription: Detailed results and personal data are never displayed by public tracking.

profile.title: My information
profile.emailHint: Changing the email address will require a new verification.
profile.phoneHint: Prefer the international format, for example +237.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.emptyDescription: Applications matching your organisation, unit, territory and permissions will appear here.

security.title: Account security
security.twoFactorDescription: The agent portal requires a temporary code in addition to the password for every new sign in.
security.startDescription: Use a trusted TOTP app on your work phone. Application access remains blocked until confirmation.
security.scanDescription: Scan this QR code in your app, then enter the resulting 6-digit code.
security.readyDescription: The next sign in will request your password followed by a temporary code.
security.recoveryDescription: Keep these codes offline in a safe location. Each code only works once.
security.recoveryAfter: The codes will appear after activation is confirmed.

admin.title: Platform administration
admin.description: This foundation prepares controlled management of organisations, territories, agents and authorisations. Editing screens will be delivered with their audit rules.

forbidden.title: Access not authorised
forbidden.description: Your account does not have the authorisation required to open this workspace.

home.title: Public services with a clear application at every step.
home.intro: Understand the procedure, prepare your documents and track your request from one secure space.
home.digitalFirstText: Every submission, review and decision leaves a dated record. You always know what was done and what comes next.
home.servicesTitle: One simple entry point for every public service
home.servicesIntro: Driving licences launch the platform. Other procedures will progressively join the same space.
home.processTitle: The application moves forward, you keep track
home.processIntro: The application rail separates completed steps, the current step and the next required action.
home.trackingNotice: The data shown here demonstrates the interface and does not represent a real application.
home.prepareText: Create your account, verify your email address and prepare your profile before the first procedure opens.

index.title: Find the procedure that fits your need.
index.intro: Search for a service and review its steps, requested information and published fees before creating an application.
index.searchLabel: Which procedure are you looking for?
index.emptyDescription: Change your search terms or select another category.

detail.demoNotice: This content is used to validate the platform. It is not an official Cameroonian procedure, fee or rule.
detail.stepsIntro: Steps are displayed in their processing order.
detail.noFees: No fee is configured for this version.
detail.startText: An account with a verified email address is required. Your draft will remain private.

statusHelp.draft: The definition may still be edited.
statusHelp.under_review: The content is awaiting independent approval.
statusHelp.published: The version is immutable and can receive new applications.
statusHelp.retired: No new application can use this version.

admin.title: Service catalogue
admin.intro: Each service belongs to your organisation. Its content remains editable as a draft and is locked after independent review.
admin.newServiceIntro: Creation automatically opens a first draft version.
admin.newCategoryIntro: Categories are shared by the catalogue. Only use a colour provided by the design system.
admin.categoryCreated: The category was added to the catalogue.
admin.codeHint: Uppercase letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.
admin.emptyDescription: Create the first service, then complete its procedure.
admin.created: The service and its first version were created.
admin.submitted: The version was sent for review.
admin.returned: The version was returned to draft.
admin.versionCreated: A new draft version was created.

editor.title: Version {number} · {service}
editor.immutableNotice: This version’s content is locked. Create a new version to change it.
editor.errorsTitle: Correct the following points before saving:
editor.demoLabel: This version only contains unofficial DEMO data
editor.stepsHelp: The order below becomes the journey shown to citizens.
editor.optionsHint: One choice per line, in the same order for both languages.
editor.amountMinor: Amount in the smallest currency unit
editor.returnReasonHint: Explain precisely what must be corrected.
editor.saveBeforeTransition: Save the draft before sending it for review.

start.title: Create a draft
start.intro: Review the selected procedure version. Creating a draft does not submit the application or trigger any payment.
start.private: This draft is private and linked to your account.
start.demoWarning: You are about to create a demonstration application with no administrative value.

draft.title: Your draft is created
draft.statusHelp: No information has been sent to an administration yet.
draft.nextText: The form for this procedure will be added in the next delivery. Your procedure selection is already saved.
